summary: Moved the DownStand common-fighter routines out of asm/melee/ft/ft_08A4.s into a new matched C file, src/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_DownStand.c, and added it to obj_files.mk. The matched file covered ftCo_800980BC, ftCo_80098160, ftCo_DownStand_Anim, ftCo_DownStand_IASA, ftCo_DownStand_Phys, and ftCo_DownStand_Coll with a 100% report for that new file. Supporting edits tightened typed GObj aliases for fighter and item objects, adjusted prototypes and includes, and removed the corresponding assembly and local sdata2 constants from ft_08A4.s.
what_changed: Added src/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_DownStand.c with C implementations for the DownStand transition check, motion-state change helper, animation callback, IASA callback, physics callback, and collision callback.
Added src/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_DownStand.h declaring ftCo_800980BC, ftCo_80098160, ftCo_DownStand_Anim, ftCo_DownStand_IASA, ftCo_DownStand_Phys, and ftCo_DownStand_Coll.
Removed the matching assembly implementations for ftCo_800980BC, ftCo_80098160, ftCo_DownStand_Anim, ftCo_DownStand_IASA, ftCo_DownStand_Phys, and ftCo_DownStand_Coll from asm/melee/ft/ft_08A4.s.
Added $(BUILD_DIR)/src/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_DownStand.c.o to TEXT_O_FILES in obj_files.mk before the remaining ft_08A4 assembly object.

Implemented ftCo_800980BC as an input-driven DownStand transition: it checks stick Y against p_ftCommonData->x244 plus ftCo_GetLStickAngle against p_ftCommonData->x20, or checks fp->input.x668 & HSD_PAD_LR, then chooses ftCo_MS_DownStandU when current motion is ftCo_MS_DownWaitU and ftCo_MS_DownStandD otherwise.
Implemented ftCo_80098160 as a thin wrapper around Fighter_ChangeMotionState(gobj, msid, Ft_MF_None, NULL, 0, 1, 0).
Implemented simple callbacks: DownStand_Anim calls ft_8008A2BC when ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining is false, DownStand_IASA is empty, DownStand_Phys calls ft_80084F3C, and DownStand_Coll calls ft_80083F88.
Changed ftCommon's ftCo_GObj typedef from HSD_GObj to Fighter_GObj.
Introduced M2CTX-aware struct definitions for Fighter_GObj and Item_GObj in forward headers while preserving HSD_GObj typedefs outside M2CTX.
Propagated Fighter_GObj types through many fighter.c and fighter.h function signatures, including Fighter_Create and Fighter_ChangeMotionState.
Changed Samus fighter variable x222C from HSD_GObj* to Item_GObj* and updated related inline code.
Adjusted includes in ftCo_DownBound.c, ftCo_Init.c, ftSs_SpecialLw_0.c, and related headers to satisfy the new declarations and stronger GObj typing.
smart_moves: Kept the decompiled DownStand file small and behaviorally direct, with helper callbacks mapping one-to-one to the removed assembly routines.
Used existing named motion IDs, common-data fields, and pad constants instead of preserving raw immediates from assembly, making the matched logic more reusable.
Inserted the new C object immediately before the remaining ft_08A4 assembly object, preserving link order while carving matched functions out of the asm file.
Removed the now-unneeded .sdata2 constants for 0.0 and 1.0 from the assembly after expressing them as float arguments in C.
Strengthened GObj typedefs to Fighter_GObj and Item_GObj instead of relying everywhere on generic HSD_GObj, which helps future M2CTX and decomp type reasoning.
Used a header for the newly matched module and included it from neighboring ftCommon code, reducing implicit cross-file declarations.
decomp_lessons: Small common-fighter action callbacks can often be matched by direct wrappers around existing engine helpers: animation completion, generic physics, and generic collision each became simple one-call functions here.
When a function chooses between related motion states, naming the current and target FtMotionId values is clearer and safer than carrying raw action-state constants from assembly.
Build-order changes are part of asm-to-C migration: add the new C object and leave the residual assembly object in place for unmatched functions.
Typed aliases such as Fighter_GObj and Item_GObj can unblock cleaner prototypes while still compiling to the same underlying HSD_GObj outside special analysis contexts.
M2CTX-specific struct declarations can provide layout visibility for tooling without forcing full concrete GObj types into normal builds.
If a matched C routine consumes literal 0.0 and 1.0 as function arguments, verify whether corresponding local sdata2 labels can be removed from the assembly remainder.
naming_conventions: Common fighter action modules use ftCo_ prefixes and Pascal/Camel action names, e.g. ftCo_DownStand_Anim, ftCo_DownStand_IASA, ftCo_DownStand_Phys, and ftCo_DownStand_Coll.
Still-unknown internal helpers retained address-based names, e.g. ftCo_800980BC and ftCo_80098160.
The new include guard for ftCo_DownStand.h used the address-style symbol GALE01_0980BC, matching the first function address in the module.
Per-system GObj aliases distinguish typed object domains: ftCo_GObj is typedefed to Fighter_GObj, and Samus item state uses Item_GObj*.
Motion IDs are represented by FtMotionId and ftCo_MS_* enum-style names such as ftCo_MS_DownWaitU, ftCo_MS_DownStandU, and ftCo_MS_DownStandD.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Translated a branchy assembly predicate into a single C if condition combining stick thresholds and the HSD_PAD_LR bit test.
Used an explicit FtMotionId local variable to mirror the assembly's selection of either 0xBA or 0xC2 before calling ftCo_80098160.
Matched Fighter_ChangeMotionState argument setup with Ft_MF_None, NULL, 0, 1, 0, corresponding to the removed assembly loading 0.0 and 1.0 constants.
Preserved empty IASA as an empty C function, matching the original blr-only routine.
Used wrapper functions for ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining, ft_8008A2BC, ft_80084F3C, and ft_80083F88 rather than inlining or refactoring behavior.
Removed only the matched slice from ft_08A4.s while leaving later symbols such as ftCo_80098214 in assembly.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename ftCo_800980BC or ftCo_80098160 to semantic DownStand helper names.
Search for other ftCommon action modules still embedded in asm/melee/ft/ft_08A4.s that can be split into small matched C files.
Check subsequent GObj typing PRs for broader adoption of Fighter_GObj, Item_GObj, and M2CTX struct aliases.
Look for review or follow-up commits around ftCo_DownStand.h include guard GALE01_0980BC and whether address-style guards were later standardized.
Search whether p_ftCommonData->x244 and p_ftCommonData->x20 receive semantic field names after this PR.
